notes:
Route opening movies don't play (tested on Paulette and Hibiki, presumably for all other routes as well). Occasionally slight audio glitches when starting, but they usually fix themselves after a few seconds or a restart. The game itself works flawlessly. The official adult patch as well as additional patches supplied by the community work fine as well. Not all routes were tested yet, so there could be bugs on other routes.
I remember the game failing to start in Proton Beta 3.16 in the past, however that seems to no longer be the case.
title: Maitetsu

notes: In-game video materials do not work, more specifically, the three opening videos for Hachiroku (Rail Romanseque), Hibiki (Pictorial), and Paulette (Silent Rail) will not play. The screen will just flash black and continue. Tested triggering by both re-entering the corresponding route and use the "Special" mode.
title: Maitetsu

notes: In-game video materials do not work, more specifically, the three opening videos for Hachiroku (Rail Romanseque), Hibiki (Pictorial), and Paulette (Silent Rail) will not play. The screen will just flash black and continue. Tested triggering by both re-entering the corresponding route and use the "Special" mode. Downgrading from 4.2-3 does not help so this is probably not a regression issue. No mojibake was observed and text rendering works normally. Host OS LANG variable is set to zh_CN.UTF-8.
title: Maitetsu

notes: Apparently the opening cut scene doesn't play but I never noticed, other cutsenes won't play as well, but everything else works perfectly.
title: Maitetsu
